properties.serializedData:
{"version": "Notebook/1.0", "items": [{"type": 1, "content": {"json": "# SpyCloud Connector Health Dashboard
**Data Pipeline Monitoring** - Monitor connector health, ingestion volumes, latency, and data freshness across all SpyCloud data sources.

> This workbook provides health monitoring across all SpyCloud connectors to ensure continuous data flow and detect pipeline issues.

---"}, "name": "title"}, {"type": 9, "content": {"version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "parameters": [{"id": "health_time_range", "version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "name": "TimeRange", "type": 4, "isRequired": true, "value": {"durationMs": 604800000}, "typeSettings": {"selectableValues": [{"durationMs": 86400000}, {"durationMs": 259200000}, {"durationMs": 604800000}, {"durationMs": 2592000000}], "allowCustom": true}, "label": "Time Range"}, {"id": "health_sev_filter", "version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "name": "SeverityFilter", "type": 2, "isRequired": false, "multiSelect": true, "quote": "'", "delimiter": ",", "query": "datatable(status:string)["Healthy", "Warning", "Critical"] | project status", "typeSettings": {"additionalResourceOptions": ["value::all"]}, "defaultValue": "value::all", "label": "Health Status"}]}, "name": "parameters"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(DataSource:string, LastIngestion:datetime, RecordCount:long, Status:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize LastIngestion=max(TimeGenerated), RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="BreachWatchlist"),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize LastIngestion=max(TimeGenerated), RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="BreachCatalog"),
(SpyCloudCompassData_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize LastIngestion=max(TimeGenerated), RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="CompassData"),
(SpyCloudCompassDevices_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize LastIngestion=max(TimeGenerated), RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="CompassDevices"),
(SpyCloudCompassApplications_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize LastIngestion=max(TimeGenerated), RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="CompassApplications"),
(SpyCloudSipCookies_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize LastIngestion=max(TimeGenerated), RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="SipCookies"),
(SpyCloudInvestigations_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize LastIngestion=max(TimeGenerated), RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="Investigations"),
(SpyCloudIdLink_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize LastIngestion=max(TimeGenerated), RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="IdLink"),
(SpyCloudExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize LastIngestion=max(TimeGenerated), RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="Exposure"),
(SpyCloudCAP_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize LastIngestion=max(TimeGenerated), RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="CAP"),
(SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize LastIngestion=max(TimeGenerated), RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="IdentityExposure"),
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize LastIngestion=max(TimeGenerated), RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="MDE_Logs"),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize LastIngestion=max(TimeGenerated), RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="CA_Logs")
| extend HoursSinceIngestion = datetime_diff('hour', now(), LastIngestion)
| extend Status = case(HoursSinceIngestion <= 2, "Healthy", HoursSinceIngestion <= 12, "Warning", "Critical")
| project DataSource, Status, RecordCount, LastIngestion, HoursSinceIngestion
| order by HoursSinceIngestion desc", "size": 0, "title": "Connector Health Status - All SpyCloud Data Sources", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "table"}, "name": "connectorHealthTable"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(union
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | extend Source="BreachWatchlist"),
(SpyCloudCompassData_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | extend Source="CompassData"),
(SpyCloudSipCookies_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | extend Source="SipCookies"),
(SpyCloudExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | extend Source="Exposure"),
(SpyCloudCAP_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | extend Source="CAP"),
(SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | extend Source="IdentityExposure")
| project TimeGenerated, Count, Source
| order by TimeGenerated asc)", "size": 0, "title": "Daily Ingestion Volume by Data Source", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "areachart", "chartSettings": {"seriesLabelSettings": [{"seriesName": "BreachWatchlist", "color": "blue"}, {"seriesName": "CompassData", "color": "orange"}, {"seriesName": "SipCookies", "color": "green"}, {"seriesName": "Exposure", "color": "purple"}, {"seriesName": "CAP", "color": "redBright"}, {"seriesName": "IdentityExposure", "color": "yellow"}]}}, "name": "ingestionVolumeTrend"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(DataSource:string, RecordCount:long)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="BreachWatchlist"),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="BreachCatalog"),
(SpyCloudCompassData_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="CompassData"),
(SpyCloudCompassDevices_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="CompassDevices"),
(SpyCloudCompassApplications_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="CompassApps"),
(SpyCloudSipCookies_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="SipCookies"),
(SpyCloudInvestigations_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="Investigations"),
(SpyCloudIdLink_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="IdLink"),
(SpyCloudExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="Exposure"),
(SpyCloudCAP_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="CAP"),
(SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="IdentityExposure"),
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="MDE_Logs"),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize RecordCount=count() | extend DataSource="CA_Logs")
| project DataSource, RecordCount", "size": 1, "title": "Record Volume by Data Source", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "barchart"}, "name": "recordVolumeBar"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(union
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize DailyCount=count() by Day=bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | extend Source="BreachWatchlist" | summarize AvgDaily=avg(DailyCount), MaxDaily=max(DailyCount), MinDaily=min(DailyCount), DaysWithData=count() by Source),
(SpyCloudCompassData_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize DailyCount=count() by Day=bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | extend Source="CompassData" | summarize AvgDaily=avg(DailyCount), MaxDaily=max(DailyCount), MinDaily=min(DailyCount), DaysWithData=count() by Source),
(SpyCloudExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize DailyCount=count() by Day=bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | extend Source="Exposure" | summarize AvgDaily=avg(DailyCount), MaxDaily=max(DailyCount), MinDaily=min(DailyCount), DaysWithData=count() by Source),
(SpyCloudCAP_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize DailyCount=count() by Day=bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | extend Source="CAP" | summarize AvgDaily=avg(DailyCount), MaxDaily=max(DailyCount), MinDaily=min(DailyCount), DaysWithData=count() by Source),
(SpyCloudSipCookies_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize DailyCount=count() by Day=bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | extend Source="SipCookies" | summarize AvgDaily=avg(DailyCount), MaxDaily=max(DailyCount), MinDaily=min(DailyCount), DaysWithData=count() by Source)
| project DataSource=Source, AvgDailyRecords=toint(AvgDaily), MaxDailyRecords=MaxDaily, MinDailyRecords=MinDaily, DaysWithData)", "size": 0, "title": "Ingestion Statistics by Data Source", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "table"}, "name": "ingestionStats"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(union
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(48h) | summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | extend Source="BreachWatchlist"),
(SpyCloudCompassData_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(48h) | summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | extend Source="Compass"),
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(48h) | summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | extend Source="MDE"),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(48h) | summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | extend Source="CA")
| project TimeGenerated, Count, Source
| order by TimeGenerated asc)", "size": 0, "title": "Ingestion Heartbeat (Last 48 Hours - Hourly)", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "linechart", "chartSettings": {"seriesLabelSettings": [{"seriesName": "BreachWatchlist", "color": "blue"}, {"seriesName": "Compass", "color": "orange"}, {"seriesName": "MDE", "color": "redBright"}, {"seriesName": "CA", "color": "green"}]}}, "name": "ingestionHeartbeat"}], "templateMetadata": {"version": "1.0", "connectorAssociation": [{"connectorId": "SpyCloudEnterpriseProtection", "dataTypes": ["SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL", "SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL", "SpyCloudCompassData_CL", "SpyCloudCompassDevices_CL", "SpyCloudCompassApplications_CL", "SpyCloudSipCookies_CL", "SpyCloudInvestigations_CL", "SpyCloudIdLink_CL", "SpyCloudExposure_CL", "SpyCloudCAP_CL", "SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL", "Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL", "SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL"]}]}}
